calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Thomas Williams, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ira A. Alegre, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Margarita Roxas McNamee, aka Margarita Roxas Trinidad, as follows:
Damages $12,000.00
Costs $300.00
Matter is taken under submission, the Court to award Attorney's Fees according to the fee's schedules.
P. M.
Attorney's Fees granted in the amount of $1,525.00, for a total of $13,825.00.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-06-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
